pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which creates the directory and export_result.sh which evaluates the file creation here.
Verified via inject_email.py which generates these two files as attachments, and export_result.sh which verifies their existence.
Verified via inject_email.py which programmatically sets the subject line.

privileged_info_summary: The correct email has the subject 'Site Update - Weekly Report #47' and contains two synthetic attachments: 'project_report.pdf' and 'materials_costs.csv'. These files must be saved to the target directory '/home/ga/Documents/ProjectFiles'.
